name: Axilion Smart Mobility Ltd
summary: Axilion Smart Mobility Ltd provides data services to the enterprise, consumer, and public sector markets in Africa. It operates a network of carrier-neutral data centers located at the undersea cable landing point, which offers a range of services, such as co-location, hosting, and cloud services, including elastic computing, infrastructure as a service, storage as a service, and streaming media. The company, through its subsidiary, Vaninga & Investimentos Limited, provides voice and data services via fixed and wireless networks in Mozambique. It also offers Internet access services to commercial customers, who in turn would provide services to SME's and consumers. The company was formerly known as Apio Africa Ltd and changed its name to Axilion Smart Mobility Ltd in December 2020. Axilion Smart Mobility Ltd is based in Tel-Aviv, Israel.
